title: eDNA Extraction Protocol from Water Samples Using GFF Filters and Bento Lab
author: Vid Švara

steps.title: Add 20 µL of Proteinase K...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL of Proteinase K to each 5 mL tube containing the filter and ATL buffer.

steps.title: Vortex briefly or manually shake to mix
steps.instruction: Vortex briefly or manually shake to mix.

steps.title: Incubate the tubes in the Bento...
steps.instruction: Incubate the tubes in the Bento Lab heat block at 56 °C for 1–3 hours, or overnight for better yield. Ensurefilters are fully submerged.

steps.title: After the incubation, transfer 400 µL...
steps.instruction: After the incubation, transfer 400 µL of the lysate (avoiding large filterfragments) into a new 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Add 400 µL volume (1:1) of...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL volume (1:1) of AL buffer to the lysate and mix thoroughly.

steps.title: Add 400 µL volume of 96–100%...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL volume of 96–100% ethanol and mix again (vortex or pipette up and down).

steps.title: Apply 600 µL of the mixture...
steps.instruction: Apply 600 µL of the mixture to a Qiagen spin column in steps; centrifuge at 6,000–8,000 rpm for 1 min in Bento Lab centrifuge.

steps.title: Discard flow-through each time and repeat...
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through each time and repeat until all of the lysate from the 1,5 mL tubeis centrifuged through the column.

steps.title: Perform the wash steps according to the original protocol
steps.instruction: Perform the wash steps according to the original protocol

steps.title: Place spin column in a new 1
steps.instruction: Place spin column in a new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 80 µL of Buffer AE or nuclease-free water
steps.instruction: Add 80 µL of Buffer AE or nuclease-free water.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 1...
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 1 min, centrifuge 1 min to elute DNA.

steps.title: An Inhibitor removal can be performed...
steps.instruction: An Inhibitor removal can be performed on each sample or the samples can be stored at -20 °C until further analysis.
